parts.text:
```plantuml
@startuml
title Update PractitionerRole

actor "Integrating application user" as User #6495ED
participant "Integrating application" as App #6495ED
participant "<FHIR API> HPI" as API #6495ED
participant "HPI Practitioner Role database" as DB #6495ED

User -> App : Update PractitionerRole\nusing\nhpi-practitionerrole-id
activate App

App -> API : PUT<Endpoint>/PractitionerRole/[hpi-practitionerrole-id]
activate API

API -> API : Validate[]

API -> DB : Request
activate DB
DB --> API
deactivate DB

API --> App : HTTP 200 reponse
deactivate API

App -> User
deactivate App

@enduml
```
